quizzes.title: World Geography Mega Quiz
quizzes.description: A comprehensive quiz covering capitals, matching, ordering and more.

questions.title: What is the capital of France?
questions.description: Choose the one correct capital city.
questions.explanation: Paris has been the capital of France since the 10th century.

questions.title: The capital of Australia is Sydney.
questions.description: Decide whether this statement is true or false.
questions.explanation: Canberra, not Sydney, is the capital of Australia.

questions.title: The capital of Japan is Tokyo.
questions.description: Fill in the blank with the correct city name.
questions.explanation: Tokyo became the capital of Japan in 1869.

questions.title: Arrange these countries by land area, smallest to largest.
questions.description: Put the countries in ascending order of total area.

questions.title: Match each country to its capital city.
questions.description: Draw a line from each country to the correct capital.
questions.explanation: These are the official capitals of each listed country.

quizzes.title: Science & Technology Quiz
quizzes.description: Questions spanning chemistry, astronomy, programming and more.

questions.title: Which of these are programming languages?
questions.explanation: Python and Rust are programming languages; HTML is a markup language and JSON is a data format.

questions.title: Water boils at 100°C at standard sea-level pressure.
questions.explanation: Water boils at exactly 100°C (212°F) at 1 atm pressure.

questions.title: The chemical symbol for gold is Au.
questions.explanation: Au comes from the Latin word Aurum meaning gold.

questions.title: Order the planets from closest to the Sun.
questions.description: Arrange these four planets in the correct order starting from the closest.
questions.explanation: The order is Mercury, Venus, Earth, Mars.

questions.title: Match each programming language to its primary creator.
questions.description: Pair each language with the person who created it.
questions.explanation: These inventors shaped modern software development.
